items.description:

Featuring detailed stitching, a secure flap closure, and adjustable straps, it's perfect for adventurers, scholars, or anyone on the go. Whether you're carrying ancient maps, rare artifacts, or just your essentials, this satchel adds a touch of vintage flair to any outfit.

items.name: Locust Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Bring a sinister little companion to your avatar with the Locust Shoulder Pet, inspired by ancient swarm legends and eerie insect spirits whispered about in forgotten ruins.

Whether you’re building a dark sorcerer look, cursed wanderer outfit, post-apocalypse survivor, or creepy-cute collector style, this detailed shoulder companion adds a mysterious presence that people notice instantly.

⚡ Why this shoulder pet stands out:
✅ High-detail 3D locust with realistic texture
✅ Fits naturally on your shoulder with most outfits
✅Perfect for cursed, dark fantasy, swarm, or anime-inspired avatar styles
✅ Show love to the Locust crew & creator

Some say it follows powerful hosts… others say it chooses them.
Add your swarm companion today before it disappears into the wind.

items.name: Celestial Commander Coat [PBR]
items.description:
✨⚔️ Armor of Light, Worn with Honor ⚔️✨
Step into the role of a divine leader with the Celestial Commander Coat. Crafted in radiant white with golden accents, this majestic outfit combines the authority of a commander with the purity of a holy knight. Flowing panels and intricate details make it a perfect choice for roleplay, fantasy battles, or anyone who seeks to shine with honor.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Detailed PBR textures for a realistic, noble finish
Gold-trimmed design adds luxury and divine flair
Long ceremonial coat for commanding presence
Perfect for roleplay as paladins, generals, or angelic warriors
🔍 Keywords: holy knight, celestial coat, commander outfit, fantasy roleplay, divine armor, white robe, gold trim, Roblox clothing, PBR outfit
⚡ Rule the battlefield with the strength of justice and the glow of divinity.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
